Just beside the River Thames, The Trout at Tadpole Bridge enjoys an idyllic location between Oxford and the Cotswolds. Less than 3 miles from the village of Bampton, this award-winning 17th-century inn provides luxurious rooms and high-quality dining recommended by, among others, the Good Food Guide.

Each guest room has been individually designed and includes a flat-screen TV with tea and coffee facilities. All have an en suite bathroom with a bath or shower, where toiletries are supplied.

An extensive breakfast menu includes Cereals, fruits & pastries, and a menu with hot breakfast choices including a Full English Breakfast. There is also fruit juice and a selection of coffees and teas.

Situées dans un cottage victorien, les chambres disposent toutes d'une salle de bains privative et d'un plateau/bouilloire. Toutes les chambres disposent d'une télévision, d'un sèche-cheveux et d'un lecteur DVD ; certaines offrent une vue superbe sur la Manche.

Le confortable restaurant du Ship Inn propose un menu varié sur lequel figurent des spécialités maison et des produits locaux. Le bar propose un large choix de bières et de boissons. Des petits-déjeuners délicieux sont servis chaque matin dans la cour ou sur la terrasse.
hotels.description_en:
Just 5 minutes' drive from the Channel Tunnel, The Ship Inn - Sandgate offers free parking, free Wi-Fi and a traditional pub restaurant. Situated in Sandgate, the inn is a mile from Folkestone Harbour.

Set in a Victorian cottage, the rooms all feature a private bathroom and tea and coffee facilities. All rooms have a TV, hairdryer and DVD player, and some have wonderful views across the English Channel.

The cosy Ship Inn Restaurant serves a varied menu, featuring homemade specials and local produce. The bar offers a range of real ales and beverages. Delicious cooked breakfasts are served daily in the courtyard or on the terrace.

With Dover Ferry Terminals just 15 minutes’ drive away, Ship Inn is only metres from Sandgate’s sandy beach.

El establecimiento, situado en una casa de campo victoriana, dispone de habitaciones con baño privado, set de té y café, TV, secador de pelo y reproductor de DVD. Algunas ofrecen vistas maravillosas al canal de la Mancha.

El acogedor restaurante Ship Inn sirve un menú variado con especialidades caseras y productos locales. El bar ofrece una amplia gama de cervezas y bebidas. Todos los días se sirven deliciosos desayunos calientes en el patio o en la terraza.

La struttura occupa un cottage vittoriano e vanta camere dotate di bagno privato, set per la preparazione di tè e caffè, TV, asciugacapelli, lettore DVD e, in alcuni casi, splendida vista sul Canale della Manica.

L’établissement Luxury Designer Boutique Annexe - Walk to Award Winning Pub se situe à Sibton, à 13 km de ce lieu d’intérêt : Château de Framlingham. Il possède un jardin, une terrasse et un parking privé gratuit. Disposant d’une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite, cette maison d'hôtes est à respectivement 24 km et 26 km environ de : Bungay Castle et Eye Castle. Cet établissement non-fumeurs vous accueille à 22 km de : Southwold Pier.

Tous les hébergements comportent une armoire. La salle de bains privative possède une douche, des articles de toilette gratuits et un sèche-cheveux. Des serviettes et du linge de lit sont fournis.

Vous séjournerez à respectivement 27 km et 39 km de ces lieux d’intérêt : Burgh et Gare d'Ipswich.

Comfortable Accommodation: Luxury Designer Boutique Annexe in Sibton offers a one-bedroom guest house with a private entrance. The property features a garden and terrace, complemented by free WiFi.
Modern Amenities: Guests can enjoy amenities such as a tea and coffee maker, walk-in shower, and free toiletries. The dining area includes a table and outdoor furniture, providing a relaxing space.
Convenient Location: Located 13 km from Framlingham Castle and 21 km from Southwold Pier, the guest house is also close to attractions like Bungay Castle and Eye Castle. Norwich International Airport is 54 km away.
